title: Final full test suite validation
description: Run the complete test suite one final time to confirm all tests pass: go test ./... . Verify all 24 E2E programs pass, all unit tests pass across all packages (lexer, parser, resolver, types, hir, mir, optimize, codegen, vm, gc, stdlib, diagnostic, repl), and integration concurrency tests pass. Report final pass/fail counts. If everything passes, the task is complete.
